architecture_ready_field_semantics: Current semantics: false blocks architecture formulation and training until a doc/31 Failure Card passes.
architecture_family: LLM4Rec-style Transformer/LM ranker with load-bearing internal query-history-candidate interaction
motivation_complete_field_semantics: C5-R3 component motivation is historically complete, but motivation for a new architecture is incomplete because no ordinary full-token Transformer defect is established.
authorized_next_stage: Run doc/31 R0 information-object audit, full-token observability parity, ordinary full-token strong-baseline tuning, and Failure Card discovery. No architecture source tree or training is authorized.

not_supported: independent value from coarse category history alignment
semantic preference transfer beyond exact repeat items
a currently validated or implementation-authorized proposed-system architecture
supported: the fixed candidate pool is query-conditioned
D2p is a strong legal non-personalized base
exact repeat-item history is a stable candidate-aligned signal beyond D2p
category-only history has no significant independent gain in the frozen control
adding the category component significantly weakens item-only ranking on history-present requests
exact non-personalized fallback when history is absent
history evidence has unequal empirical fidelity, creating a traceable design problem

decision.stage_interpretation: C5-R3 kills its two preregistered claims. C01-C80 later showed that its broad evidence-fidelity contrast does not identify an architecture; current authorization returns to R0 problem discovery.

historical_parallel_candidates.architecture_axis: event-level counterfactual evidence contract inside a Transformer
query-candidate-history-conditioned low-rank modification of LM internals
triadic query-history-candidate transport with an explicit null sink

historical_boundaries.C5-R2: Aggregate freshness-balanced correct-history value survived, but same-query identity specificity failed the frozen 2/3 rule.
historical_boundaries.D1: Mean-history and query-attentive residuals did not stably beat their base.
historical_boundaries.M3_M4: Construct validity failed under the Random-channel null.

historical_insight.architecture_consequence: Design one candidate-conditioned evidence-fidelity calibration primitive that preserves reliable recurrence and admits a transferable residual only when joint query/history/candidate evidence supports it. This is a design hypothesis, not an established outcome.
historical_insight.design_falsification: Before full implementation, freeze and pass a gate requiring no degradation versus item-only on repeat-present requests, stable positive value over D2p on the 4677 non-repeat history-present requests, failure of coarse-only/wrong-user/shuffled-event/query-masked controls to reproduce the value, and exact D2p fallback without history.
historical_insight.falsification_result: The multi-granular primary and sole coarse-semantic fallback both failed exactly as frozen.
historical_insight.name: unequal evidence fidelity: reliable recurrence versus unvalidated transfer
historical_insight.observation: In the frozen KuaiSearch B0b/D2s bundle, stable history gain is concentrated in exact candidate-item recurrence. Coarse category alignment has no independent significant gain and weakens item-only ranking when added; treating both as equally reliable is therefore empirically wrong.
